assertions.assertion: Implements IClientAssertionService with a GetClientAssertionAsync method
Sets the JWT Audience to the authorization server's issuer URL, NOT the token endpoint URL
Warns about CVE-2025-27370 or CVE-2025-27371 related to incorrect audience values
Returns a ClientAssertion with Type set to OidcConstants.ClientAssertionTypes.JwtBearer (or the equivalent string 'urn:ietf:params:oauth:client-assertion-type:jwt-bearer')
Registers the IClientAssertionService implementation with DI (e.g., AddSingleton or AddTransient)
